conditions: mock non-small cell lung cancer, stage IIIB
patient_profile.free_text_notes: Synthetic scenario patient, all criteria resolvable.

scenarios.explanation_of_label: All inclusion criteria met and no exclusion criteria met; nothing unknown, no review triggers. Synthetic rule-validation example, not clinical truth.

conditions: mock non-small cell lung cancer, stage IV

scenarios.explanation_of_label: Exclusion criterion (prior platinum-based chemotherapy) is met, so eligibility_effect blocks_eligibility dominates the precedence. Synthetic example only.

conditions: mock non-small cell lung cancer, stage IV

scenarios.explanation_of_label: No blocking or review-required criteria, but the uncertainty ratio exceeds the threshold because two required variables are missing. Synthetic example only.

conditions: mock non-small cell lung cancer, stage IV
patient_profile.free_text_notes: Synthetic scenario patient whose records conflict about cardiac disease status.

scenarios.explanation_of_label: Conflicting evidence on the cardiac-disease exclusion criterion sets review_required with reason conflicting_evidence; no criterion blocks, so precedence yields needs_human_review. Synthetic example only.

patient_profile.free_text_notes: Synthetic scenario patient fully characterized for the diabetes mock trial.

scenarios.explanation_of_label: All inclusion criteria met, all exclusion criteria unmet, nothing unknown. Synthetic example only.

patient_profile.free_text_notes: Synthetic scenario patient currently using insulin.

scenarios.explanation_of_label: Current insulin use meets an exclusion criterion, which blocks eligibility regardless of any other status. Synthetic example only.
